## LibraryData.isEncryptedCollectionFile() function

Checks if a JSON object appears to be an encrypted collection file. Uses the format field as a discriminator.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function isEncryptedCollectionFile(json: unknown): boolean;
```
